name: GH_PreviewMode
summary: Lists all possible Grasshopper preview modes.

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.summary: Preview is not drawn in the Rhino viewports.

enum_values.name: Wireframe
enum_values.summary: Only wireframe preview is drawn in the Rhino Viewports.

enum_values.name: Shaded
enum_values.summary: Wireframe and shaded previews are drawn in the Rhino Viewports.
